prompt_text: Gao father, a dignified middle-aged ancient Chinese scholar-official father, lean build, stern square face with tired kind eyes, streaks of gray hair in a neat topknot, dark teal traditional robe, restrained authority mixed with deep paternal tenderness, positioned right-center in a medium close-up; his brows tightly furrowed, lips pressed flat to suppress anger, torso subtly leaning toward his daughter in a shielding posture, gaze fixed with disgust and vigilance toward Lu Shuyi behind him. prompt_text: A full-shot confrontation in an ancient Chinese banquet hall: on the left stands Lu Shuyi, a frail young noblewoman in ancient Chinese attire, pale skin, watery downturned almond eyes, slim delicate figure, black hair in an elegant traditional updo, light pink silk hanfu with gauze layers, fragile yet calculating expression; on the right stands Gao Lingning, a tall elegant young Chinese noblewoman in historical hanfu, pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura, stepping half a pace forward from beside her father to face Lu Shuyi directly. Slightly behind her at right rear is Gao father, a dignified middle-aged ancient Chinese scholar-official father, lean build, stern square face with tired kind eyes, streaks of gray hair in a neat topknot, dark teal traditional robe, restrained authority mixed with deep paternal tenderness, forming a protective background presence. Jiang Sheng, a tall, upright young Chinese man from a historical drama, athletic but not bulky, honest and restrained expression, clear long eyes, straight nose, neat black topknot, dark indigo round-collar robe with light armor-like riding details, humble yet dependable aura, slight blush on ears, and Zhaozhao, a delicate premature baby girl from ancient Chinese nobility, big luminous dark eyes, pale soft skin, tiny fragile body wrapped in moon-white and blush pink silk, fine black baby hair, subtle jade charm, warm indoor lamplight, tender yet fateful presence, appear within the surrounding group space. Guests, gift boxes, and banquet tables form an invisible court of judgment around them, while a clear empty strip of floor separates the two women like a severed bond.
